creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have a part-done driver based on the Intel wireless work I am doing using the linuxkpi framework.

I would hope that once the Intel work is done most infrastructure is implemented and it'll be at most a few days to have rtw88 work well as well.

Currently PCI attach and firmware loading works and then it panics due to some unimplemented memory bit.  I only spent less than a day on it so far to get to this.

So yes, there is a plan.  It'll be a while however before anything real materialises.
